description_long: This is a classic claw hammer with a robust, metallic head and a dark, ergonomic handle. The head features a flat striking face on one side for driving nails and a curved claw on the opposite side for prying and removing nails. The handle appears to be coated with a textured, grippy material, likely rubber or a composite, designed for comfortable and secure handling. The hammer's overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The surface of the head is matte and shows no signs of wear or damage, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. The proportions and construction suggest it is suitable for general carpentry or household tasks in urban environments.
description: A claw hammer with a metallic head and a dark, ergonomic, textured handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from the side, clearly displaying the curved claw and flat striking face of the head, as well as the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the front, showing the narrow profile of the head and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the symmetry of the head, with the claw and striking face visible, and the handle's ergonomic shape.
description_view_3: The hammer is seen from the back, emphasizing the width of the head and the handle's grip texture.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized ergonomic grip handle, straight with a contoured, textured surface for enhanced grip and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the other for nail removal.
